text.title: VUI Market Context Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable brief inputs to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Input is a request to assemble or refresh a VUI market brief?

conclusion.verdict: skip; route to vui-conversation-design or market-researcher
refresh first via templates/refresh-script.py; do not publish stale brief

branch.question: Every data row has value + year + source_url + geo + denominator?

conclusion.verdict: reject brief; reject any row missing a required field

branch.question: All source_url hosts in trusted allowlist?

conclusion.verdict: drop non-allowlist rows; refresh from primary source
add Custom LLM-VUI row before publish
publish; downstream consumer must not mix denominators in derived metrics

text.example: request_type=brief_assembly → brief_age_days=0 → row_field_completeness=true → source_in_allowlist=true → llm_native_row_present=true → conclusion = publish (denominator-discipline applies downstream).
